column category range, including a header in the first row; blank or scalar columns create a summary across all columns
value range, including a header in the first row

output.name: pivot
output.description: pivot table with a TOTAL row and column

column category range, including a header in the first row; blank or scalar columns create a summary across all columns
value range, including a header in the first row
significance level from 0 to 1
confidence interval direction

output.name: pivot
output.description: pivot table with a TOTAL row and column

value range, including a header in the first row

NORM.DIST.RANGE.summary: Computes the probability of an interval under the normal distribution.

parameters.description: distribution mean
positive standard deviation
lower interval bound; a blank cell means minus infinity
upper interval bound; a blank cell means plus infinity
numeric sample; blank cells are ignored
0=autodetect, 1=first cell is a header, 2=no header

KOLMOGOROV.SMIRNOV.summary: Performs the Kolmogorov-Smirnov goodness-of-fit test for the selected distribution.

parameters.description: numeric sample; blank cells are ignored
optional code of the tested distribution; default is 0
0=autodetect, 1=first cell is a header, 2=no header

T.TEST.1S.summary: Performs a one-sample t-test against a specified hypothetical mean.

parameters.description: numeric sample
hypothetical mean
optional direction code; default is 0
significance level
optional header mode code; default is 0
binary sample in 0/1 or FALSE/TRUE form
hypothetical population proportion
optional direction code; default is 0
significance level
optional header mode code; default is 0

WILCOXON.PAIRED.summary: Performs the Wilcoxon signed-rank test for dependent measurements.

parameters.description: first measurement
second measurement
optional header mode code; default is 0
significance level
optional direction code; default is 0

WELCH.TEST.2S.G.summary: Performs Welch's two-sample t-test for two independent groups.

parameters.description: group labels defining exactly two independent groups
numeric observations aligned with categories
header mode code
significance level
test direction code

output.name: n
output.description: number of observations in the group

output.name: df
output.description: degrees of freedom of Welch's test

output.name: tᶜʳⁱᵗ
output.description: critical t value for the selected direction and α

MANN.WHITNEY.G.summary: Performs the Mann-Whitney test for two independent groups.

parameters.description: labels of exactly two groups
numeric observations
optional header mode code; default is 0
significance level
optional direction code; default is 0

output.name: a descriptive statistics table by group
output.description: a descriptive statistics table by group

parameters.description: observed category frequencies
expected frequencies or probabilities
optional category labels
significance level
optional header mode code; default is 0

output.name: χ²
output.description: a test summary with χ², df, α, critical value, and p

output.name: O
output.description: a category table with O, E, and contribution (O−E)² / E

ANOVA.G.summary: Performs one-way ANOVA on grouped data.

parameters.description: group labels
numeric observations
0=autodetect, 1=first row is a header, 2=no header
significance level
optional post-hoc procedure code; default is 0

output.name: η²
output.description: effect sizes η², ω², and f

ANOVA.RM.summary: Performs one-way repeated-measures ANOVA across columns.

parameters.description: value matrix; rows are subjects and columns are conditions
header mode
significance level
post-hoc procedure

enumValues.meaning: Tukey; Bonferroni fallback in this implementation
Games-Howell; Bonferroni fallback in this implementation

output.name: sd
output.description: sample standard deviation of the condition

output.name: SS
output.description: sum of squares in the ANOVA table

output.name: sphericity
output.description: note that sphericity is not tested

ANCOVA.G.summary: Performs ANCOVA with one factor and one or more covariates.

parameters.description: series of group categories
series of dependent-variable values
covariate matrix; individual covariates are in columns
post-hoc procedure

enumValues.meaning: Tukey; Bonferroni fallback in this implementation
Games-Howell; Bonferroni fallback in this implementation

parameters.description: significance level
header mode

output.name: n
output.description: number of complete observations in the group

output.name: y
output.description: group mean of the dependent variable

output.name: adjusted_mean
output.description: group adjusted mean at mean covariate values

output.name: SE
output.description: standard error of the adjusted mean

CONTINGENCY.T.summary: Analyzes a contingency table entered directly as a frequency matrix.

parameters.description: matrix of observed frequencies
table label mode

enumValues.meaning: top row and left column are labels

parameters.description: significance level

output.name: χ²ᶜʳⁱᵗ(1−α)
output.description: critical value of the chi-square distribution

CONTINGENCY.G.summary: Builds and analyzes a contingency table from grouped data.

parameters.description: series of future table column categories
series of future table row categories
series of pair frequencies; when omitted, each pair has frequency 1
significance level
header mode

output.name: χ²ᶜʳⁱᵗ(1−α)
output.description: critical value of the chi-square distribution

CORREL.SPEARMAN.summary: Computes Spearman correlation and its significance test.

parameters.description: first numeric range
second numeric range
optional direction code; default is 0
significance level
optional header mode code; default is 0

CORREL.MATRIX.summary: Builds a correlation matrix including p-values and significance markers.

parameters.description: value matrix; columns are variables
computation method
output type

enumValues.meaning: coefficient, p-value, and significance below each other
coefficient with significance in one cell

parameters.description: filter for displayed links by p-value
header mode

output.name: p
output.description: two-tailed p-value for the correlation test

output.name: sig.
output.description: significance mark based on the p-value
